---
title: "Judicial Alignment"
author: "Noory Okthariza"
date: "2026-07-23"
categories:
  - Judicial Politics
  - Text Analysis
  - Indonesia
---

## Introduction

Test

## Measuring similarity

Suppose that we have embeddings for three documents:

- the petitioner's argument;
- the government's argument;
- the court's legal reasoning.

We can calculate:

\[
A_i =
\cos(C_i, P_i) -
\cos(C_i, G_i)
\]

where \(C_i\) represents the court text, \(P_i\) represents the
petitioner text, and \(G_i\) represents the government text.
